record.field:
👋 Hi there! I'm your Perfect HR AI Assistant. I can help you with:
• HR module features & capabilities • Pricing and packages • Scheduling a demo • Any HR management questions
How can I help you today?
Complete HR management solution built on Odoo

Perfect HR is a comprehensive Human Resource Management solution built on Odoo Community Edition v18. It provides a complete suite of HR modules designed to streamline every aspect of workforce management.
Key Modules: - Payroll Management: Automated salary calculation, tax deductions, bank transfers, and payslip generation - Attendance Tracking: Biometric integration, GPS-based check-in, shift management - Leave Management: Multi-level approval workflows, accrual policies, calendar integration - Recruitment: Job posting, applicant tracking, interview scheduling, offer management - Performance Management: KPI tracking, 360-degree feedback, performance reviews - Training & Development: Course management, certification tracking, skill gap analysis - Employee Self-Service: Mobile app, document management, request portal
Perfect HR is designed for organizations of all sizes, from startups with 10 employees to enterprises with 10,000+ staff. Our AI-powered analytics provide actionable insights for strategic HR decision-making.

Perfect HR Payroll Module provides end-to-end payroll processing:
Features: - Automated salary computation based on attendance, leaves, and overtime - Multi-currency and multi-company support - Tax calculation and statutory compliance - Bank file generation for bulk salary transfers - Payslip generation with customizable templates - Loan and advance management with EMI deductions - Bonus and incentive processing - Year-end tax reporting and Form 16 generation - Integration with accounting for journal entries - Employee self-service for payslip viewing
Benefits: - Reduce payroll processing time by 80% - Eliminate manual calculation errors - Ensure compliance with local labor laws - Complete audit trail for all payroll transactions
Advanced attendance with biometric and GPS support

Perfect HR Attendance Module offers comprehensive time tracking:
Features: - Biometric device integration (fingerprint, face recognition) - Mobile GPS-based check-in/check-out - QR code attendance for events - Shift management with rotating schedules - Overtime calculation with configurable rules - Late coming and early leaving tracking - Work-from-home attendance management - Real-time attendance dashboard - Automated notifications for absent employees - Integration with payroll for accurate salary computation
Supported Devices: - ZKTeco biometric devices - Hikvision face recognition terminals - Any device supporting ZKTeco protocol
The module supports flexible work arrangements and can handle complex shift patterns including split shifts, night shifts, and rotational duties.
Flexible pricing for all organization sizes

Perfect HR offers flexible pricing to suit every organization:
STARTER Plan ($5/employee/month): - Core HR & Employee Directory - Leave Management - Basic Attendance - Employee Self-Service Portal - Email Support - Best for: Small teams (1-50 employees)
PROFESSIONAL Plan ($10/employee/month): - Everything in Starter - Payroll Processing - Advanced Attendance (Biometric) - Recruitment Module - Performance Management - API Access - Priority Support - Best for: Growing companies (50-500 employees)
ENTERPRISE Plan ($15/employee/month): - Everything in Professional - AI-Powered Analytics - Custom Workflows - Multi-company Support - Training & Development - Dedicated Account Manager - SLA Guarantee (99.9% uptime) - Best for: Large organizations (500+ employees)
All plans include: - Free implementation support - Data migration assistance - 30-day free trial (no credit card required) - Monthly or annual billing (20% discount on annual)
Contact us for custom enterprise pricing for 1000+ employees.

Frequently Asked Questions about Perfect HR:
Q: Is Perfect HR cloud-based or on-premise? A: Perfect HR is available both as a cloud-hosted SaaS solution and as an on-premise installation. The cloud version is hosted on secure AWS servers with daily backups.
Q: How long does implementation take? A: Typical implementation takes 2-4 weeks for small organizations and 6-8 weeks for enterprise setups. This includes data migration, configuration, and training.
Q: Can I migrate from my existing HR system? A: Yes! We provide free data migration support. We can import data from Excel, CSV, or directly from systems like SAP HR, Workday, BambooHR, and others.
Q: Is there a mobile app? A: Yes, Perfect HR has a mobile app for both iOS and Android. Employees can mark attendance, apply for leaves, view payslips, and more from their phones.
Q: What kind of support do you offer? A: We offer email support for Starter plans, priority email and chat support for Professional, and dedicated account management with phone support for Enterprise.
Q: Is my data secure? A: Absolutely. We use AES-256 encryption, SSL/TLS for data in transit, regular security audits, and comply with GDPR and local data protection regulations.
Q: Can Perfect HR handle multiple countries/currencies? A: Yes, Perfect HR supports multi-currency, multi-company, and multi-country configurations with localized payroll compliance.
How TechCorp reduced HR processing time by 75%

Case Study: TechCorp Bangladesh — 500 Employee IT Company
Challenge: - Manual attendance tracking using paper registers - Payroll processing took 5 days each month - Leave management was chaotic with no visibility - No centralized employee database
Solution: Implemented Perfect HR Professional Plan with: - Biometric attendance integration (ZKTeco devices at 3 offices) - Automated payroll with Bangladesh labor law compliance - Leave management with 4-level approval workflow - Employee self-service portal
Results: - Payroll processing time reduced from 5 days to 4 hours (95% reduction) - Attendance accuracy improved from 85% to 99.5% - Leave management went fully paperless - HR team freed up 30 hours/week for strategic initiatives - Employee satisfaction with HR services increased by 45% - ROI achieved within 3 months
Quote: "Perfect HR transformed our HR operations completely. What used to take our team days now happens automatically." — HR Director, TechCorp
